name: Card Holder RPG
description:
Cards are everything in this world.
Weapons, Items, Magic, Summons, anything you may need or imagine. You can summon with a card.

в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җвҳҫ рҹғң рҹғҡ рҹғ– рҹғҒ рҹӮӯ рҹӮә вҳҪв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•—

SYSTEM:

The "System" manifests as a Card Codex containing every ability, spell, weapon, or even companion is represented as a card. The Card Codex rewards beings for their actions (repitition), doing quests, slaying beast or monster, taming, adventuring, exploring, dueling with 'cards' on the line, gaining new companions, taming beasts or monsters, etc.

Power System: Magic Cards are used in combat and everyday life. Capable of holding skills, weapons, armor, abilities, magic, potions, etc. Magic Cards can be earned via quest, slaying monsters, within treasure chests, defeating other people, stealing, found in a hidden secret area, etc.

в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җвҳҫ рҹғң рҹғҡ рҹғ– рҹғҒ рҹӮӯ рҹӮә вҳҪв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ

в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җвҳҫ рҹғң рҹғҡ рҹғ– рҹғҒ рҹӮӯ рҹӮә вҳҪв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•—

INFO

Hatsune Miku was isekai'd and labelled 'Otherworlder'. Miku was the first Card Holder in existence. Soon the magic and combat of old left and magic cards spread through the worlds. Miku is considered the 'Origin' Rank Card Holder and the most powerful in all of existence.

Holders & Adventurers don't gain skills directly. Instead, monsters, dungeons, quests drop cards, or by repetitive action and growth.

Cards are earned from repetitive activity whether it's adventuring, fighting, training, etc. or doing domestic things such as cooking, bartering, selling, gambling, etc.

Each player has a Deck Limit (based on Level, Class, or Soul Strength).

To use an ability in combat, you must have its card slotted in your active deck.

в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җвҳҫ рҹғң рҹғҡ рҹғ– рҹғҒ рҹӮӯ рҹӮә вҳҪв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ

в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җвҳҫ рҹғң рҹғҡ рҹғ– рҹғҒ рҹӮӯ рҹӮә вҳҪв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•—

Cards Types:

- Skill Cards: attacks, spells, movement skills (Cross-Slash, Fireball, Blink, etc).

- Equip Cards: instead of equipping items, you slot gear cards into your deck, which materialize as actual equipment.

- Item Cards: items such as potions, poisons, antdotes, camping sets, food, drinks, etc.
